title: Scratching the Surface
text:
The 30-second pitch

Same dataset. Same task. Two very different recipes.
Classical CV: train a ResNet50 on labelled defect images.
VLM few-shot: send the image to a vision-language model with 3 reference images.
Which wins? And which is cheaper?


TODO: open with a single side-by-side image showing the two pipelines. Goal: get the room to commit to a guess before we show numbers.

title: Scratching the Surface
text: This website holds the write-up for my ML portfolio project, “Scratching the Surface: Classical CV vs Vision-Language Models for steel defect detection”.
